title: helianthemum marifolium var. dichroum
intro: Helianthemum marifolium var. dichroum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for skin issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Rockrose include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically to treat wounds and skin conditions, or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
